name: stat-card
description: A KPI (key-metric) card: a heading, a big primary value, an optional description line carrying a trend icon (before/after the text), an optional leading icon, a semantic colour tint, and an optional whole-card link (the entire tile becomes one <a>). The dashboard stat tile the kit's io.lievit.kit.StatWidget resolves to (heading / value / description / icon / color / descriptionIcon + IconPosition / url + newTab). The inline sparkline rides an optional chart slot (a chart island), not the static card. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the stat-card partial to your JTE root at lievit/stat-card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.stat-card(heading="Annunci attivi", value="142"). Add a description + descriptionIcon for a trend line (iconPosition before|after), a leading icon, a color tint, and a url to make the whole tile a link (newTab to open in a new tab). Pass a chart island through the chart slot for the StatWidget sparkline. The source is yours: edit freely.
